items.caption: A spiral notebook with a cover that depicts a scene of a window with light streaming through, set against a dark background that appears to be a stairwell with a brick wall. the window is framed with a white border and has a white door at the bottom, suggesting it might be a basement or cellar. the light from the window illuminates the stairwell, creating a contrast between the bright and dark areas. the notebook itself is designed with a black and white color scheme, and the text "currituck" is visible, indicating the name of the location or the theme of the notebook. the overall style of the image is moody and atmospheric, with a focus on the interplay of light and shadow.
closeup on the corner of a dark window with a half browning banana in front of a green apple on the sill.
